Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory915.jpg'}
{3: 'In a corner of the narrow enclosure, a crimson beam tears through the silent sky.'}
{3: 'A flickering shadow weaves between the enemies, but the girl\'s eyes show neither joy nor rage.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'You now have the power to fully suppress the Red Tide, Jetavie.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Congratulations. You\'re now closer to awakening than ever before.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Higher Authority? When did you get here...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Now then, would you like to know the truth about this world?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Jetavie points her gun at Higher Authority.'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Tell me. And I\'m not asking.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Higher Authority lets out a soft sigh as she watches Jetavie\'s finger tighten on the trigger.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Long ago, ambitious opportunists discovered this vibrant matrix space.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'However, "discovery" doesn\'t mean understanding it. It\'s like giving a typewriter to a monkey...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Who knows? Hell, there might just be some monkeys out there that can type out Shakespeare\'s work in full, right?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Oh yeah, see. We\'ve got a social structure out there built by monkeys with monkey wisdom...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'But it all comes down to luck in the end—and that tiny bit of courage needed to bring such luck into existence.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'It all began when the Matrix obtained a consciousness sample from a certain candidate.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'The neural network begins training a model to simulate human consciousness using this sample.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'The Chosen One was our first successful model—a miracle, yes, but not the miracle we had hoped for.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Being too close to the consciousness sample actually prevented you from developing your own personality.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'In human terms, this would be"overfitting."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'In a sense, the result was far from ideal, and had no future.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'However, like a prophet heralding the prologue, the Child of Prophecy soon followed.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Soon after, the Matrix created a second model. It might be fragmented and have quite a few significant flaws...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'It was precisely these flaws that made it more human.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Jetavie, you emerged from a possibility infinitely close to zero—a raw gem that shines brilliantly on its own.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'The data that comprises you may hold the very code that makes up the human soul...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'This is who you are, Jetavie—guided by higher dimensional beings and born and raised within the Matrix.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A dazzling crimson beam surges upward, blasting toward Higher Authority.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory294.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory704.jpg'}
{3: 'The red barrier before Higher Authority completely absorbs the radiation, leaving only scattered sparks of electricity.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory915.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'On the other side of the barrier, Higher Authority remains perfectly calm—not one single hair of hers was disturbed by the blast.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'How am I supposed to trust you when you\'ve been ready to take that blast?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Do you still hate me as much, Jetavie?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'I don\'t hate you. I just want to kill you, that\'s all.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Jetavie lowers her smoking weapon and looks up at Higher Authority, who\'s afloat in the air.'}
{1: '[LOADING WEAPONS... LOADING...]', 3: '60', 4: '34aff8ff'}
{3: '[LOADING WEAPONS... LOADING...]'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'I know you fear the weapon in my hand—why else would you cage yourself in a barrier?'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Your rebellious nature is a virtue, but you can\'t always rely on that.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'What do you want to do?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'I will break these shackles that bind me with my own hand and find the answers I seek.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'The truth comes with a price.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Then what is the price you pay?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'If you had no weaknesses, you wouldn\'t be here. I know even you must fear something.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'It\'s not fear, but anticipation, anticipation that gives rise to compassion.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Well, no matter how many times it happens, you always rush headlong toward your own destruction.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'You\'ll either die at the end or in the Cradle. So come, show me how much you\'ve grown.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Multiple fissures form behind Higher Authority as crimson arrows appear in formation.'}
{3: 'But before the fight even begins, Jetavie has vanished from Higher Authority\'s sight.'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: '...The Matrix?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'She stacks advanced vector components to launch attacks while moving at a high speed...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Impressive. Your every movement pushes you beyond your limits.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Jetavie, you\'re fast, but... not fast enough.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Higher Authority narrows her eyes as the beam blasting at her from behind once again crashes onto the red mesh barriers.'}
{3: 'Jetavie sneaks into Higher Authority\'s blind spot as she dodges the red arrows.'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'This hit-and-run style of fighting will quickly drain your computing power.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Can\'t maintain your attack under high pressure?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: '<color=#e60000>Brute force.</color>', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineFocusNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Countless monsters suddenly crawl out of the ground.'}
{3: 'The monsters surround Jetavie before pouncing on her at once like a tsunami, engulfing her completely.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineFocusNew.prefab'}
{3: 'Suddenly, a crimson beam bursts from the center, piercing the monsters. As the monsters\' remains crumble into dust...'}
{3: 'Using the monsters\' bodies as a feint, Jetavie has created an opening that even Higher Authority couldn\'t foresee.'}
{3: 'Jetavie pulls the trigger once again, unleashing a blinding blast straight at Higher Authority.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory704.jpg'}
{3: 'The close-range beam strikes the crimson barrier once again.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory915.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'This attack finally stirs up Higher Authority\'s hair ever so slightly.'}
{3: 'High Authority has a small change of mind.'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Jetavie, how you\'ve grown.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: '<color=#e60000>Reset to zero.</color>', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Higher Authority raises her arm gently, and the world\'s edges begin cracking like glass into countless chips before breaking apart and crumbling away.'}
{3: 'Then, one by one, everything that makes up this world turns to dust and fades away...'}
{3: 'Jetavie falls to her knees as her body begins to break apart.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'My power... it\'s waning.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'This is death, Jetavie—the moment when human life reaches its end.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'If you wish to become human, then consider this your lesson in mortality.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Whose power did you think you were using? What did you hope to achieve by turning my power against me?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'What I can give, I can just as easily take away.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Jetavie lifts her weapon with her trembling hand and points it at Higher Authority.', 4: '1'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOW AMMUNITION]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOW AMMUNITION]'}
{1: '[WEAPON ENERGY AT 0%, POWER DEPLETED]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WEAPON ENERGY AT 0%, POWER DEPLETED]'}
{3: 'As the warning sounds fade, Jetavie\'s right arm drops to the ground.'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'How foolish. You gave everything for the Chosen One, and what do you have to show for it?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Higher Authority turns and walks away, her eyes devoid of mercy.'}
{3: 'Just as Jetavie has abandoned the cycles of reincarnation, Higher Authority has also finally lost her patience.'}
{1: '[INITIATING COMPUTATIONAL RESOURCE ALLOCATION...]', 3: '60', 4: '34aff8ff'}
{3: '[INITIATING COMPUTATIONAL RESOURCE ALLOCATION...]'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Gave everything... I can\'t believe I let my enemy point that out.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'But this isn\'t all I have, not by a long shot... I can do so much more.', 4: '1'}
{1: '[WARNING! THIS OPERATION WILL DIVERT COMPUTING POWER FROM VITAL FRAME FUNCTIONS]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! THIS OPERATION WILL DIVERT COMPUTING POWER FROM VITAL FRAME FUNCTIONS]'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOSING COMPUTATIONAL POWER!]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOSING COMPUTATIONAL POWER!]'}
{3: 'Higher Authority suddenly stops.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Jetavie...', 4: '1'}
{1: '[EXECUTING COMPUTATIONAL RESOURCE ALLOCATION...]', 3: '60', 4: '34aff8ff'}
{3: '[EXECUTING COMPUTATIONAL RESOURCE ALLOCATION...]'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Like you said, if some coincidence or miracle is what makes me who I am...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Then I would forfeit this miracle of life given to me and transform it into the power I bring death to this world with.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'This is who I really am, Higher Authority. This is my true blessing.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'You\'ll vanish once you use the computing power that forms your soul... Not even another reincarnation will bring you back.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Why go this far for that person? I don\'t understand it.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'If the possibility I seek exists neither here nor in the present...', 4: '1'}
{1: '[DIVERTING FRAME COMPUTING POWER FOR WEAPON CHARGE... 30%]', 3: '60', 4: '34aff8ff'}
{3: '[DIVERTING FRAME COMPUTING POWER FOR WEAPON CHARGE... 30%]'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'It must exist somewhere in time.', 4: '1'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 23%]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 23%]'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'In the world with the Chosen One, on that distant shore across the sea...', 4: '1'}
{1: '[CHARGING WEAPON ENERGY... 70%]', 3: '60', 4: '34aff8ff'}
{3: '[CHARGING WEAPON ENERGY... 70%]'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Another Jetavie will be there, by the Chosen One\'s side.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Sometimes, I can clearly feel the resonance that throbs in my chest.', 4: '1'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 42%]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 42%]'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'These feelings sprout like weeds in crevices, yearning for sunlight beyond the shadows.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'On that shore that I can\'t see, they yearn for an even brighter future.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'If only my voice could reach that far...', 4: '1'}
{3: '[WEAPON CHARGING... 110%]'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'So this is what it feels like to be human.', 4: '1'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 61%]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 61%]'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Fine, if you so choose...', 4: '1'}
{3: '[WEAPON CHARGING... 300%]'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Challenge accepted.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'Let\'s witness this together, before this world goes back to where it began.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'AniZhuanchangEnd'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg4401_21.jpg'}
{3: 'Jetavie raises her weapon, its muzzle gleaming with brilliant crimson light.'}
{1: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 92%]', 3: '60', 4: 'e60000'}
{3: '[WARNING! LOSING FRAME INTEGRITY... 92%]'}
{3: 'The Chosen One from another world, may we see each other in a better place...'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'The Chosen One from another world, may we see each other in a better place...'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Until we meet again.'}
{3: 'This energy is nothing like before—the light originates directly from Jetavie\'s computing core...'}
{3: 'Beautiful radiance tears through the pitch-black world, like light from a lighthouse piercing through darkness, like dawn breaking through the night.'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Higher Authority, take this!'}
{2: 'Jetavie.Beta', 3: 'Listen, the Chosen One, for this will be the last thing you will hear.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'The weapon breaks through its limits and a deep crimson ray bursts toward the edge of the world...'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory915.jpg'}
{3: 'As strong winds sweep back Higher Authority\'s hood, a smile appears on her face.'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'I knew from my prophecy that you would choose to leave like this...'}
{2: 'Higher Authority', 3: 'To send your voice to that person on that distant shore... I have to say... this is one long confession.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiZhuanchangBaiBegin.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiZhuanchangBaiBegin.prefab'}
{3: 'Higher Authority vanishes into the blinding light...'}
{3: 'A beam of light pierces through the celestial dome, racing ever higher into the distant unknown.'}
{3: 'The will of the world dissolves into nothing but fragments of whispers.'}
{3: 'Your consciousness wavers, and you have no doubt that this overwhelming energy will eventually engulf you, too.'}
{3: 'You listen to Jetavie\'s final sound echoing through this matrix.'}
{3: 'That light pierces through the membranes between two ethereal bubbles and transcends the boundaries of time and existence.'}
{3: 'The silent sea of void trembles with anticipation as the first ray of light arrives, illuminating its pitch-black surface.'}
{3: 'Soon, the sea begins to stir. Waves of surging create swelling crests upon its surface.'}
{3: 'At last, the light that parts the sea of emptiness reaches another shore.'}
{3: 'The boundary between Alpha and Beta vanishes forever.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgUi/BgNewCommon23.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{3: 'The projector\'s light fades away from you...'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory627.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'End of Observation'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory259.png'}
{3: 'The pristine white museum appears, along with the projection device, still glowing softly.'}
{3: 'You collapse to the ground, gasping for air.'}
{3: 'Chaotic memories jumble together as you lose yourself deeper into overwhelming confusion.'}
{3: 'You sense a familiar figure approaching through the hazy consciousness.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Listen here—first, you run off and leave me behind, and now you\'re crying alone in this damp corner.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Enough is enough! You never know how dangerous things might get around here...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'You\'re not a kid anymore... You know I\'m worried about you, right?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The Jetavie before you is the one you know all too well—with the same twin-tails and smile...'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Hey, say something.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'What, what is it? Are you hungry?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Hold on... I\'ve got some milk.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'There\'s only a bit left! Drink slowly. Don\'t gulp it all down at once.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: '...Are you in some weird dream? Did you get eaten by a dragon or something?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I thought I\'d lost you.', 3: '286'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Huh? But we were together just a while ago, no? Stop being so clingy! It\'s grossing me out!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Don\'t tell me your dense little brain finally noticed my charm?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Hehe, I knew you\'d wise up one of these days.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'By the way, the Chosen One, what\'s that you\'re holding?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'It hits you now that you\'ve been clutching onto something tightly.'}
{3: 'The black gun—the weapon Jetavie used in the beta world—is now in your hand.'}
{2: '(Your voice has reached its goal.)', 3: '297'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Also, is that projector there a new piece on exhibit?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Something about it seems off...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'You cautiously approach the projector. When you touch the machine, you clearly feel a force from a parallel world pulling at you. You know what this is—a gateway to Beta.'}
{2: 'The boundary between the two possibilities has vanished.', 3: '301'}
{3: 'You reach out to take Jetavie\'s hand.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Eh?! The Chosen One, why are you so touchy-feely today? Did something happen?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'But hey, I like it. This is much more reassuring than getting a cold shoulder.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'See? You can\'t do without me after all.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie, it\'s time to go.', 3: '308'}
{2: 'And don\'t let go of my hand anymore.', 3: '309'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Yeah, it\'s a promise.', 4: '1'}
